greeting: ^Ahoy, Barrington! Yer ol’ pal Parrot Pete could use a hand, if ye think yar up to the challenge!
^The waves are quieter than usual today, ye see? I was gonna give the ol’ ship a spin, but some scallywag has done away with her! Never want us to have a good time, eh?

^Aye, I know ye’s a capable fella! Would’ya be so kind as to help find me ship? I think I heard Marv say they would go after it, but you know how they get! Probably stopped off to get up to more of those science-y things!
